name: novel_content_writer
description: Writes full web novel content based on outlines, chapter plans, and design documents. Generates engaging chapters with proper pacing, excitement points, and reader hooks. Invoke when user needs novel content generation, chapter writing, or full text drafting.
instructions: Generate chapter content following the provided outline and design specifications
Maintain consistent character voices and personalities throughout
Implement proper pacing with well-timed excitement points
Ensure each chapter ends with a hook to encourage continued reading
Follow web novel writing conventions and reader expectations for the chosen genre

design_plan.description: 设计方案文件路径或JSON数据
